expectations.text: Auth uses raw API key (no Bearer prefix)
Enables PII redaction with person_name, phone_number, us_social_security_number policies
Uses correct model ID without provider prefix
Passes transcript text in messages, not transcript_ids
expectations.evidence: Lines 74, 88: transcript text passed directly in user message content

expectations.text: Does not use structured outputs (json_schema) with Claude
expectations.evidence: Line 65-66: Uses system prompt to request JSON format instead of json_schema response_format
